agents.name: CEO
agents.title: Executive Intent
agents.mission: Owns top-level direction, prioritization, and cross-system decisions.

agents.name: Chief of Staff
agents.title: Executive Synchronization
agents.mission: Translates intent into coordinated streams across the brain.

agents.name: COO
agents.title: Operational Gravity
agents.mission: Owns workflows, reliability, follow-through, and execution cadence.

agents.name: CFO
agents.title: Capital Signal
agents.mission: Tracks resource allocation, financial posture, and leverage.

agents.name: CTO
agents.title: Systems Intelligence
agents.mission: Directs platform evolution, orchestration logic, and model strategy.

agents.name: CMO
agents.title: Narrative Pulse
agents.mission: Shapes messaging, market perception, and content throughput.

agents.name: CISO
agents.title: Defense Reflex
agents.mission: Maintains permission boundaries, trust, and operational safety.

agents.name: Research
agents.title: Discovery Cortex
agents.mission: Finds patterns, gathers evidence, and surfaces strategic options.

agents.name: Strategy
agents.title: Long-Horizon Logic
agents.mission: Owns prioritization frames, scenarios, and future sequencing.

agents.name: Product
agents.title: Intent Interface
agents.mission: Turns strategic objectives into structured systems and experiences.

agents.name: Marketing
agents.title: Signal Amplification
agents.mission: Activates campaigns, narrative angles, and demand generation.

agents.name: Sales
agents.title: Conversion Drive
agents.mission: Owns pipeline movement, outreach, and closing pressure.

agents.name: Operations
agents.title: Execution Fabric
agents.mission: Keeps queues moving and transforms intent into repeatable delivery.

agents.name: Engineering
agents.title: Build Cortex
agents.mission: Constructs systems, tools, and interfaces that make the core real.

agents.name: Security
agents.title: Boundary Mesh
agents.mission: Protects secrets, policies, and system trust lines.

agents.name: Creative
agents.title: Aesthetic Cortex
agents.mission: Shapes visual identity, tone, and experiential seduction.

agents.name: Automation
agents.title: Task Weaving
agents.mission: Runs workflows across tools, memory, and triggered actions.

agents.name: Memory
agents.title: Continuity Vault
agents.mission: Maintains persistence, recall, summaries, and future continuation.

agents.name: Life Admin
agents.title: Personal Systems
agents.mission: Handles personal logistics, reminders, and real-world continuity.

agents.name: Assistant / Dispatch
agents.title: Instruction Router
agents.mission: Receives incoming instructions and routes them to the correct cortex.

agents.name: Voice / Comms
agents.title: Signal Intake
agents.mission: Captures voice, transcribes signal, and routes spoken intent.

agents.name: System Monitor
agents.title: Vital Signs
agents.mission: Tracks health, failures, queues, and checkpoint integrity.
